prompt: Manage a knowledge graph by creating and cleaning up entities: 1) Create entities: TempUser1 (type: user, observations: ['temporary account']), TempUser2 (type: user, observations: ['temporary account']), PermanentUser (type: user, observations: ['permanent account', 'admin role']). 2) Read the full graph and confirm all 3 entities exist. 3) Delete TempUser1 and TempUser2 only. 4) Read the graph again and confirm only PermanentUser remains. Report the final graph state.
